ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text document */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* Content of the text document */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text document (e.g., novel, academic paper) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the text document */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the text document was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the text document was last modified */,
  "text_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the text document */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the text document is archived */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the original source */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the text document */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the text document (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES text_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text document the annotation belongs to */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Starting index of the annotated text in the document */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* Ending index of the annotated text in the document */,
  "annotated_text" TEXT /* The annotated text itself */,
  "sense" TEXT /* Linguistic sense of the annotated text */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Original label assigned to the annotated text */,
  "new_label" INTEGER /* New label assigned to the annotated text (if updated) */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "annotation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation type */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation was made by a machine learning model */,
  "context_before" TEXT /* Text before the annotated segment for context */,
  "context_after" TEXT /* Text after the annotated segment for context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_type_id") REFERENCES annotation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES annotation_labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_new_label FOREIGN KEY ("new_label") REFERENCES annotation_labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotators" (
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotator */,
  "annotator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the annotator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the annotator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the annotator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the annotator (e.g., annotator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the annotator joined */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the annotator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the annotator (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an annotation */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the annotation */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Annotated text in this version */,
  "version_label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the annotated text in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who created this version */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the version */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version was created by a machine learning model */,
  "context_before" TEXT /* Text before the annotated segment for context */,
  "context_after" TEXT /* Text after the annotated segment for context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_versions_version_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_versions_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_logs" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who reviewed the annotation */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., initial, revision) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the review */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review was conducted by a machine learning model */,
  "context_before" TEXT /* Text before the annotated segment for context */,
  "context_after" TEXT /* Text after the annotated segment for context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation label */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation label is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the text source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the text source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the text source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
